seo.title: Physical Therapy Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your PT clinic. Route unhappy patients to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Physical Therapy
hero.subheading: Progress takes weeks. ReviewFlo helps you ask at milestones without turning care into a marketing pitch.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Physical Therapy Clinic Faces

items.heading: Patients feel better quietly
items.body: They may not think to post when range of motion returns.

items.heading: Pain and insurance stress boil over in public
items.body: Billing confusion lands as angry stars tied to your name.

items.heading: Therapists run back-to-back sessions
items.body: There is no natural pause to coach reviews at every discharge.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Physical Therapists

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after a win
items.body: Send after a clear milestone your patient actually notices.

items.heading: Private channel for clinical concerns
items.body: Frustration goes to your team before a public post.

items.heading: HIPAA-aware habits
items.body: Focus asks on experience, not diagnosis details.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Can we stay compliant while asking for reviews?
items.a: Yes. Keep requests about the visit and communication, not treatment specifics.

items.q: What if progress feels slow to the patient?
items.a: They can message privately so you can reset expectations without a public fight.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing model without a price built for hospital networks.
Supported on higher tiers with separate dashboards.

items.q: Do we need an EMR hookup?
items.a: No. Manual sends are fine to start.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Physical Therapy Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
